title: stillingia salpingadenia subsp. saxatilis
intro: Stillingia salpingadenia subsp. saxatilis, commonly known as Yellowroot, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow or white roots that contain medicinal compounds. The medicinal properties of Stillingia salpingadenia subsp. saxatilis lie in its root, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Stillingia salpingadenia subsp. saxatilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic benefits.
